response.overview: It turns out that the hottie with the shy smile is not so innocent after all. It's the girls you've fantasized about - prom dates, cheerleaders, your buddy's sister, and more - as the country's hottest newcomers shoot the fantasy video of their dreams. The competition was fierce as Playboy knocked on doors in neighborhoods all over America to handpick girls who were worthy of the show's title. Tempting and always enticing, they represent hometown goodness and after-dark excitement. We're sure that these sizzling starlets will touch you in all the right places. Hosted by 1999 Playmate of the Year Heather Kozar.
response.title: Playboy: American Beauties
